# Sprint 6.1 Compute Management

**Sprint:** Sprint 6. Performance And Cost Optimization
**Objective:** Optimize platform performance and cost to ensure scalability, reliability, and cost-effectiveness.

## Description
Implement compute management capabilities, including auto-suspend and auto-scale settings, to optimize resource utilization and cost.

## Deliverable
